index.title: Resource Translator
index.description: Vhura muchina-wakashandurwa kudhonza zvikumbiro zvemafaera ezviwanikwa mune chero repo, mune chero fomati.
index.badge: v3.0 — Node 24, repo config, glossary, dry run
index.lede: Resource Translator inovhura muchina-wakashandurwa kudhonza zvikumbiro zvemafaera ako ekushandisa Azure AI Muturikiri kuburikidza neyepamutemo SDK — hapana mamwe masevhisi, ingori kufamba kwebasa.
index.workflowBody: Donhedza chiito muCI yako iripo, inongedzera kuAzure AI Muturikiri, uye rega repo yako itaure mutauro wega wega waunotarisa.

stats.node: Zvaungaita Kuti Zvive Nyore Kuti Uite Izvozvo / 20 / 22 / 24

config.title: Repo-level config
config.body: Drop a .github/resource-translator.yml for include globs, glossaries, and Custom Translator categories.

glossary.title: Glossary-kuziva
glossary.body: Vhara mazita emhando uye mazwi echigadzirwa ne smart word-boundary regex iyo inobata C ++, .NET, uye shamwari.

dryRun.title: Dry-run + yakapfava-kukundikana
dryRun.body: Ongorora shanduro pasina kunyora mafaera, kana kuvhura chikanganiso chega chega seyambiro paunenge uchidzokorora.

outputs.title: PR-inoshamwaridzika miburitso
outputs.body: Summary-title, summary-details, and has-new-translations slot directly into create-pull-request.

sdk.title: Official Azure SDK
sdk.body: Yakavakirwa pa @azure-zororo / ai-shanduro-chinyorwa + @azure / core-rest-pipeline - otomatiki kudzokorora pa408/429/5xx, hapana ruoko-rwakungurutswa HTTP. esbuild-bundled, audit-clean.

getting-started.title: Kutanga
getting-started.lede: Wedzera faira rekushanda, nongedzera kune yako Azure AI Muturikiri zvitupa, uye chiito — chakavakirwa paMicrosoft's yepamutemo @azure-zororo / ai-shanduro-chinyorwa SDK — ichaongorora iyo repo yeanobva-mutauro zviwanikwa mafaera uye kuburitsa hama dzakashandurwa.

provision.title: Provision an Azure AI Translator resource
provision.body: Gadzira Azure AI Muturikiri sosi muAzure portal, wobva wachengeta zvinotevera seGitHub repository zvakavanzika kuitira kuti kufamba kwebasa kugone kuzviverenga:

resource.title: Ita Source Resource File
resource.body: Mazita anozivikanwa uye asinganzwisisi ane zita rezita. <sourceLocale>. <ext> gungano. Semuenzaniso Greetings.en.resx inova Greetings.fr.resx, Greetings.de.resx, zvichingodaro mushure mekumhanya.

output.title: Ongorora zvakabuda
output.body: Kana iyo workflow yapera, chiito chinofumura zvinhu zvitatu zvaunogona kubatanidza mune PR tsananguro: pfupiso-musoro, pfupiso-tsananguro, uye ine-nyowani-shanduro. Inonyorawo pfupiso yeMarkdown mune peji rebasa kuburikidza necore.summary.

nextSteps.title: Matanho anotevera
nextSteps.recipes: Ona mabikirwo emonorepos, tsika glossaries, uye Custom Translator zvikamu.

configuration.title: Configuration
configuration.lede: Ratidza kutadza kamwe chete mu .github/resource-translator.yml uye rega yega yebasa ienderere nhaka. Zviito zvinogara zvichikunda kana zvese zviri zviviri zvakapihwa.

inputs.title: Inputs & Outputs
inputs.lede: Zvese zvinopihwa zvinogamuchirwa mune yakasarudzika repo config faira. Kana ese ari maviri akaiswa, chiito chinokunda.

formats.title: Mafomati efaira
formats.lede: Six round-trippable resource formats. Chiito chinoverenga yega yega sosi-locale faira, inoshandura kukosha, uye inonyora hama pane yakanangwa nzvimbo.

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.lede: Maitiro akajairika ekushandura kwekutakura: monorepos, glossaries, tsika dzetsika, kumhanya kwakaoma, uye kutonga kwetoni.

faq.title: Mibvunzo Inonyanya Kubvunzwa
faq.lede: Mhinduro dzinokurumidza kumibvunzo inowanzo kuuya kana uchitora chiito.

translations.title: Shanduro
translations.filterPlaceholder: Tsvaga nemutauro, kodhi kana zita rekuzvarwa ...
translations.translationPending: Translation pending — open a translate-docs run.

contributing.title: Kupa
contributing.lede: Bug mishumo, zvikumbiro zvemaficha, uye zvikumbiro zvekudhonza zvese zvinogamuchirwa. Chiito chidiki zvakakwana kuti chive nehushamwari kune vekutanga-nguva vanopa.

changelog.title: Shanduko
changelog.lede: Pfupiso yemhando yepamusoro yekuburitswa. Iyo canonical, ine chiremera changelog inogara CHANGELOG.md mune yekuchengetera.
